install_blocker.command: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y unar
install_blocker.issue: requires interactive sudo password; no TTY available to the automated tool session
install_blocker.resolution: user ran the install (or cached sudo credentials) outside this session, per explicit request

original_unrar_install_reason_now_supers: not needed; unar extraction succeeded, so the fallback condition (install unrar only if unar demonstrably fails) was never triggered - this was true only up to that point in the same session; unar's extraction later demonstrably failed (39/308 files truncated), triggering exactly that condition

correction_2026_07_13_continuation_stage.gap_identified: unrar was installed by the user following the truncation discovery, but the prior session ended before extraction was retried with unrar - the 39-file blocker was an incomplete workflow (fix installed, not run), not a missing package
